editableProperties.description:
This dashboard gives your team a real-time view of incoming orders and processing status. You can see order volume trends, identify bottlenecks in fulfillment, and track key metrics like average order value and processing times.

The main view shows today's orders alongside weekly and monthly comparisons, so you can spot patterns or unusual spikes quickly. Filter by product category, sales rep, or customer type to drill down into specific segments. The processing status section highlights orders that need attention, whether they're stuck in review, waiting for inventory, or ready to ship.

Use this dashboard during daily standup meetings to prioritize work, or check it throughout the day to stay on top of order flow. Sales managers can monitor team performance, while operations folks can identify where orders are getting delayed and take action before customers start calling.

properties.description:
# Personally Identifiable Information

Personally Identifiable Information (PII) refers to any data that can be used to identify a specific individual, either directly or indirectly when combined with other information. Dataset and column contents can be inferred either by the dataset or column name, description, or column sample values.

## Direct Identifiers

Any dataset or column that contains the following information:

*   Full name
    
*   First name
    
*   Middle name
    
*   Last name
    
*   Social Security Number or national ID
    
*   Driver's license number
    
*   Passport number
    
*   Email address
    
*   Phone number
    
*   Physical address
    
*   Biometric data (fingerprints, facial recognition)
    
*   Account numbers
    
*   IP address (in some jurisdictions)
    

## Indirect Identifiers

Any dataset or column that contains the following information:

*   Date of birth
    
*   Place of birth
    
*   Gender
    
*   Race/ethnicity
    
*   Job title and workplace
    
*   Education information
    
*   Geographic indicators
    
*   Medical information
    
*   Vehicle registration information
properties.name: PII
